svg.text: Dynamic Task Queue • Weighted Agent Selection • Terminal Conditions
Checkpoint/Resume • Timeout Protection • Budget Enforcement (Max 2h, $50 AUD)
Weight Adjustment: Tournament convergence • Generation success • Evolution improvement
⚠️ Mandatory Safety Gates: Generation → Safety Review → Reflection → Tournament
Citation Graph • Quality Scores • Limitation Extraction
Output: Winner ID • Rationale • Elo Changes
⚠️ Creates NEW Hypothesis (New ID, Inherits Elo)
Complete flow from generation through evolution with tournament loop
Evolved Hypothesis → Back to Step 1 (Safety Gate)
• Safety gate is MANDATORY for all hypotheses
• Minimum 2 reviewed hypotheses required for tournament
• Elo rating inherited by evolved children
• Parent marked EVOLVED (not deleted, audit trail)
• Zero-sum Elo updates (winner gains = loser loses)
Rating Change: Δ_A = K × (S_A - E_A) where K=32, S_A ∈ {0, 1}
• Multi-turn trigger: Top-10 OR Elo diff < 100
Terminal Conditions (System Stops When Any Met)
• Ranked Hypotheses (Elo ratings, complete lineage, literature citations, experimental protocols)
• Research Overview (synthesis, patterns, research directions, diverse sample, expert contacts)
• Meta-Review (recurring strengths/weaknesses, agent feedback, improvement opportunities)
PostgreSQL (hypotheses, reviews, matches, observations) • Redis (caching, 24h papers, 7d metadata)
ChromaDB (vector embeddings, semantic search) • LiteratureRepository (PDF parsing, citations)
PubMed MCP • Semantic Scholar API • Tavily Search • LangSmith Tracing
FastAPI + React • http://localhost:8000/docs • Chat Interface • Hypothesis Browser
Dashboard • Literature Upload • Real-time Progress Tracking • Checkpoint/Resume • Async Adapter
Version: Enhanced v2.2 - Comprehensive Tournament, Lifecycle & Infrastructure Documentation
20,680 lines Python • 28 tests • 31 data models • 98 docs
